text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the morning assembly, Ms. Kashimoto
wastes no time criticizing the staff and students
of Tracen for being undisciplined.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on to say that she will implement
Operation Oversight, a program that will oversee
everything from the students' training to their
meals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but she also suspends the Unity
Cup, claiming that team activities would only
lead to dangerous, irrational decisions driven by
emotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her announcements are met with booing. Taiki
Shuttle complains that she's being too harsh, but
her argument is promptly shot down.
